{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Crushing Black Palm
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Crushing Black Palm]] is a technique that combines a [[Forger echo technique]] and an [[Enforcer]] attack technique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Crushing Black Palm]] can produce multiple strikes at once from a single palm strike.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
